commit.message:
feat: longer synthesis, objectivity enforcement, and UX improvements

Synthesis: increase maxTokens 8192→16384 for split-mode summary,
expand RIASSUNTO to 4-6 paragraphs, increase word ranges across all
13 case-type templates, add completeness rule to ABSOLUTE_RULES.

Objectivity: add OGGETTIVITÀ E IMPARZIALITÀ rule requiring all
statements to be anchored to documented evidence [Ev.N]. Rewrite
CTP role from advocacy-based to evidence-based analysis. Strengthen
CTU and Stragiudiziale roles with mandatory document references.
Fix nesso causale, danno biologico, and conclusioni sections to
require explicit documentary basis for every claim.

UX: sticky wizard step bar and result tabs, collapsible document
list (max 5 with "Mostra tutti"), lazy-load events (20 at a time),
sticky report header with action buttons, mini-TOC for report
section navigation.

Also includes: classification review step, anomaly detector
improvements, and pipeline resilience fixes from prior sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix spatial reparent placing child on wrong side of non-root target

When a non-root node with no previous sibling pressed Alt+Right, the
spatial reparent fallback hardcoded the direction hint as inverted
(child faces back toward origin). This is correct for root targets but
wrong for non-root targets where children must extend away from root.

Now uses branchDirection() for non-root targets, which returns the
correct direction (+1 for right-side branches, -1 for left-side).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

iris: surface scheduler diagnostics in ListJobs for CLI visibility (#3578)

- `ListJobs` (used by `iris job list` CLI) only showed autoscaler hints
for pending jobs, never calling `get_job_scheduling_diagnostics()`. This
meant CLI users and agents couldn't see the root cause like
`"Insufficient memory (need 16.0GB, available 4.2GB) — 49 worker(s)"` —
they'd only see the autoscaler's generic `"Waiting for workers..."`
message.
- The dashboard's `GetJobStatus` path already called scheduler
diagnostics, which is why the dashboard showed the real reason but CLI
didn't.
- Now `ListJobs` creates a scheduling context lazily (only when pending
jobs exist) and calls `get_job_scheduling_diagnostics()` per pending
job, combining both scheduler and autoscaler reasons into
`pending_reason`.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: claude[bot] <41898282+claude[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Russell Power <rjpower@users.noreply.github.com>

The chart and prose now cover the complete KYPA reform: standard deduction
increase, bracket rate changes (35%→41%, 37%→43%), and AMT interaction.
Previously only the standard deduction piece was shown. Key additions:
- Intro mentions rate increases
- "Who is affected" section describes three income ranges including
  net tax increase above ~$855k for MFJ
- Max savings figures with full reform ($13,327 at $615k MFJ)
- Methodology notes the full reform scope

commit.message:
Add area_ha generated column to areas and properties

- areas.area_ha: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ST_Area(boundary::geography)/10000
- properties.area_ha: same pattern
- Both are STORED — computed on insert/update, zero query overhead
- Rebuild views.sql to expose area_ha in properties_geo and areas_geo
- Update schema.sql to reflect current live schema (parent_id, level,
  area_ha, type now nullable on areas)
- Fix: areas.type NOT NULL constraint dropped (level captures hierarchy;
  type is an optional subcategory for richer tagging later)

Current areas on Eaton Farms:
  Ghanzi Farm 5162ha | Monitsela 3092ha | Ojacks 5268ha
  Ghanzi South 1830ha | Ghanzi West 2288ha | Ghanzii East 761ha
  Long Camp 181ha | House Camp 7ha

commit.message:
fix: prevent null.fixed crash in RequestAnalysisTab bulkFixReport modal

Wrap ModalOverlay in conditional guard {bulkFixReport && ...} so children
JSX is not evaluated when bulkFixReport is null. React evaluates children
expressions before parent can return null, so ModalOverlay's open guard
was insufficient. Revert unnecessary optional chaining back to direct
property access since outer guard guarantees non-null.
